The '''Soomans''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoids]] indigenous to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sooma]], located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
They were ruled by King [[Zornog]]. When General [[Sludd]] tried to usurp the throne of nearby [[Alzar]], he tricked [[Alzarian/Legends|Alzarian]] heir Prince [[Plooz]] into running away to [[Sooma]] on a freighter; Plooz was later rescued by [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]].

Ten months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], many of them were killed in the [[Stenax Massacres]], when the [[Stenax]] invaded using stolen [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] technology.<ref name="The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series">{{GamerCite|1|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series}}</ref>
